name: I'm behind the counter
hints: Behind the hotel counter! The Cashbox treasure is here, plus a sign.
GET BOX for the Cashbox treasure. READ SIGN says 'Ring for ROOM service'.
The sign hints at using the bell in the hotel room for a ghost to appear.
GET BOX. The sign tells you to HIT BELL in the hotel room (27). N=lobby (28).
notes: Behind hotel counter. Cashbox treasure and room service sign here. N=lobby (28).
